$schema_comment: Hooks that automate verification for the Spring Boot project.

hooks.command: mvn clean verify > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] build OK' || (echo '[harness] build FAILED — check compilation and tests' && tail -n 20 /tmp/harness_init.log)
hooks.description: Before closing the session, forces a full Maven build and verification.
